scenes.title: The Discovery
scenes.summary: A trio of feathered Tyrannosaurus rex emerge from the prehistoric foliage, their amber eyes fixing on a massive Argentinosaurus drinking at a sun-drenched watering hole. The three-ton sauropod stands oblivious, its long neck sweeping low as water ripples across the mud-flat.

shots.prompt: Wide establishing shot of a dusty Cretaceous watering hole at golden hour, morning sun casting long amber shadows across shallow muddy banks, distant volcanic peaks on horizon, dust particles floating in thick atmospheric haze, camera slowly pans across the serene landscape revealing ancient ferns and cycads lining the water's edge.

Low tracking shot following three juvenile Tyrannosaurus rex moving through tall vegetation, scientific accuracy visible in feathered plumage along head and neck, muscular legs with correct digitigrade stance, forwards-facing binocular vision evident in head movement, scaly textured skin catching the warm directional light, dust kicked up with each powerful footfall.

Medium shot as the T. rex pack freezes, heads turn simultaneously toward the watering hole, forward-facing eyes with precise depth perception visible, one rex emits a low frequency infrasound rumble, camera cuts to reveal massive Argentinosaurus emerging from dust clouds, barrel-shaped body with correct sauropod proportions, long muscular neck supporting massive head, four columnar legs supporting enormous weight, sunlight catches the ridged texture of its huge body.

scenes.title: The Stalk
scenes.summary: The pack coordinates with calculated precision—one T. rex advances through the brush while the other two circle wide on either flank, their muscular tails swinging for balance. The lead predator's forward-facing binocular vision tracks the prey's every tremor, feathers bristling along its skull and neck as tension builds.

shots.prompt: Overhead drone-style shot showing the tactical positioning, three T. rex spread into flanking arc around the watering hole, dust swirls around their moving legs, scientific muscular builds visible in shoulder structure, camera orbits slowly revealing the calculated spacing between predators, heavy atmospheric dust creates dramatic volumetric lighting effects.

Ground-level extreme close-up of T. rex footprints pressed into muddy earth, each print showing precise three-toed digitigrade track with claw marks, dust particles settle around the fresh impressions, camera pulls back to show the tracks leading toward the Argentinosaurus position, morning backlight casting dusty god rays through the scene.

Side tracking shot of two T. rex moving in synchronized flanking maneuvers, feathered neck plumage ruffling with each step, muscular tails counterbalancing their bodies with proper biomechanical motion, forward-facing eyes scanning constantly, dust kicked up in controlled bursts, dramatic side lighting emphasizing muscle definition and textured scales, intense focus visible in their predatory gaze.

scenes.title: The Hunt
scenes.summary: The hunt erupts in violent motion—the pack surges forward in synchronized assault, jaws snapping at the Argentinosaurus's thick hind legs as it heaves its enormous body skyward. The lead T. rex locks onto the sauropod's flank with crushing bite force while the others press the assault, their three-fingered claws gouging for purchase on the panicked giant.

shots.prompt: Wide shot of the attack initiation, lead T. rex breaks from cover in explosive burst, dust cloud erupts from powerful hind legs_propelling massive body forward, camera shakes with the impact of each thundering footfall, morning sun behind casting dramatic rim lighting on muscular scaly frame, jaws open showing correct dental arrangement, prey drive clearly visible in forward-focused eyes.

Medium tracking shot of coordinated pack attack, two T. rex at flank positions as third makes direct approach, Argentinosaurus responds with massive neck swing turning huge body, dust erupts in chaotic clouds, camera captures the sheer scale difference between predators, muscular T. rex bodies with correct proportions visible in action, feathered plumage whipping with rapid movement, dramatic backlighting creating silhouettes through dense dust atmosphere.

Ground-level intense close-up as T. rex delivers precise biting attack to Argentinosaurus hind leg, scaly skin texture visible in extreme detail, muscular jaw structure with correct dental placement clamping down, camera captures the impact shudder through massive bodies, dust and debris exploding outward, Argentinosaurus massive foot stamps creating ground震动 visible in camera shake, dynamic angle showing the hunt's raw biological intensity, dust particles catching dramatic golden hour light in thick atmospheric haze.
